instrument_label: M&F Bancorp Optus merger — ECIP redemption contingent cash (embedded in MFBP common)
instrument_type_note: Not a separately listed CVR. Contingent cash consideration payable to MFBP common holders if ECIP preferred is redeemed. Pre-close, economics sit inside the tradeable MFBP share price.
tradeable_vehicle: MFBP common stock (OTC) — contingent piece not stripped

milestones.description: Successful repurchase / redemption of certain outstanding MFBP preferred shares issued under the U.S. Treasury Emergency Capital Investment Program (ECIP)
milestones.deadline_press: Prior to or within 12 months following merger closing

timeline_mgmt_email_2026-07.source: James H. Sills III email to shareholder (forwarded 2026-07)
claims: At this point M&F Bank has met all requirements to redeem ECIP
Treasury will not accept redemption applications prior to 2026-08-15
Treasury indicated ~10 days to review application and another 30-90 days to complete redemption
timeline_mgmt_email_2026-07.implied_earliest_completion_window: Roughly late Sep 2026 through early Dec 2026 if application filed soon after Aug 15

milestones.notes: Press (EIN / OTC) vs CEO email disagree slightly on the clock (12 months from close vs from 2026-06-21). Treat email as color; merger agreement / proxy is authority when filed.

advisors.mfbp_legal: Brooks, Pierce, McLendon, Humphrey & Leonard, LLP

fairness_notes: Fairness opinion: Piper Sandler advised MFBP; extract when DEFM14A files on EDGAR (not filed as of 2026-07-23).
market_implied_notes: Pre-close: MFBP share price ≈ PV(deal close risk on $46.57) + PV(prob of $6.73 ECIP contingent). Naive p_mkt on contingent alone needs quote: p ≈ max(0, (price - cash_spread_to_46.57) / 6.73) after adjusting for close risk — do not treat full gap to $53.30 as ECIP probability.
example_role: Canonical pre-close example: tradeable equity embeds contingent cash; no separate OTC CVR ticker.
open_diligence: Obtain definitive merger agreement / CVR or contingent payment exhibit when filed on EDGAR
Reconcile deadline: 12 months from close (press) vs from 2026-06-21 (CEO email)
Confirm whether contingent payment is a formal CVR, escrow, or contractual earnout
Add CIK and download script once SEC filings appear
